# StyleSwift browser extension overview (2026-03-16 12:11Z)

_**User**_

2. What the extension does (it's a browser extension sidepanel for styling web pages)
3. The manifest.json to understand extension configuration

5. The CSS file at extension/sidepanel/panel.css - read it FULLY (it's the main stylesheet)

- Project file structure
- Key UI components and views
- Current visual design approach (colors, typography, layout patterns used in CSS)
- Assets and icons used
- Any design system or CSS variables defined

Be very thorough - read the full panel.css file.
